Home → Discography → Thug Pound

Thug Pound

2009 · Hi Power Entertainment

A collaboration with Long Beach rapper Bad Azz, a West Coast legend affiliated with DPGC, which also inspired the album’s title (Bone Thugs + Dogg Pound). The collaboration was preceded by earlier joint efforts on Bizzy’s releases through Hi Power Entertainment. Like Back With The Thugs Vol. 2, the album was produced by Seriouss Sam, Makavelik, and Nu-Ration, though individual track credits are not specified. Bad Azz passed away on November 11, 2019, under unclear circumstances, four days after being arrested and jailed for domestic violence.

"This is for tranquility, heaven screaming out bloody hell, Bail me out quickly."

— Get Your Gun On
